scripts.docs:pages-output: rm -rf out storybook-static apps/storybook/storybook-static && cp -R apps/docs/out out && cp -R apps/docs/out storybook-static && cp -R apps/docs/out apps/storybook/storybook-static
scripts.storybook:pages-output: rm -rf out storybook-static && cp -R apps/storybook/storybook-static out && cp -R apps/storybook/storybook-static storybook-static
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @nexu-design/tokens build && pnpm --filter @nexu-design/ui-web build && pnpm --filter @nexu-design/mcp build
scripts.check:docs: pnpm check:docs-metadata && pnpm docs:typecheck && pnpm docs:build
scripts.pack:check: pnpm --filter @nexu-design/tokens pack:check && pnpm --filter @nexu-design/ui-web pack:check && pnpm --filter @nexu-design/mcp pack:check
scripts.release:check: pnpm check:publishable-packages && pnpm build:packages && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm pack:check
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/storybook/node_modules apps/demo/node_modules packages/ui-web/node_modules packages/tokens/node_modules apps/storybook/storybook-static apps/demo/dist apps/demo/dist-electron apps/demo/release
